failures.description: Heavy stringing between towers on the calibration print. Lots of wispy hairs everywhere.
failures.fixed_by: Reduced temperature to 230°C and enabled wipe on loop. Also dried filament for 4 hours at 55°C.
failures.notes: PETG from the new spool had been sitting out for 3 weeks. Suspect moisture was a factor.

failures.description: Corner of a 200x80mm flat plate lifted during print around layer 15. Used smooth PEI sheet.
failures.fixed_by: Added 10mm brim, raised bed temp to 65°C, disabled cooling for first 5 layers.
failures.notes: No brim was the main issue. Large flat part needs brim on smooth PEI.

failures.description: Stringing again on a vase print. Not as bad as last time but still present.
failures.notes: Same PETG spool, dried. Still some stringing. May need to try 220°C.

failures.description: Print cracked along layer lines when I tried to remove the supports. Very brittle.
failures.fixed_by: Raised temp to 250°C and turned fan off entirely. Added enclosure blanket.
failures.notes: ABS needs no fan and as little cooling as possible for good layer bonding.
